title: Multiple connection sterile connector
abstract: The present disclosure pertains generally to devices and methods useful to aseptically connect fluid paths. In certain aspects, the present disclosure provides devices and methods useful for sterily connecting multiple fluid pathways in a non-sterile field. Such devices can include hubs having at least one aseptic connector and first portion movable relative to a second portion so as to place the aseptic connector in fluid communication with one or more ports of the hub. Methods of connecting fluid paths in an aseptic manner are also disclosed.
claims: Claims IB CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A hub comprising: a first portion, a second portion, a first port with a first port conduit and first port opening, a second port with a second port conduit and second port opening, and a third port with a third port conduit and third opening; wherein the first and second portions are configurable from a first configuration to a second configuration; wherein in the first configuration, the first port conduit is in fluid communication with the second port conduit; wherein in the second configuration, the first port conduit is in fluid communication with the third port conduit; and wherein at least one of the first port, second port, and the third port comprises an aseptic connector having a removable strip closing the port opening. 2. The hub of claim 1, wherein at least one of the second port and the third port comprises an aseptic connector having a removable strip closing the port opening. 3. The hub of claim 1 or 2, wherein at least two of the first port, second port, and the third port comprises an aseptic connector having a removable strip closing the port opening. 4. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein both the second port and the third port comprise aseptic connectors. 5. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein the first port comprises an aseptic connector. 6. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein in the first configuration, the first port conduit is not in fluid communication with the third port conduit. 7. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein in the second configuration, the first port conduit is not in fluid communication with the second port conduit. 8. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein the first port is positioned on the first portion and the second port and the third port are positioned on the second portion. 9. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein the first portion is rotatable relative to the second portion to configure from the first configuration to the second configuration. 10. The hub of any preceding claim, wherein the hub is in sterile medical packaging. 11. A method of using the hub of any preceding claim, comprising: flowing a fluid through the openings of the first and second ports in the first configuration without flowing the fluid through the opening of the third port. 12. The method of claim 11, comprising: configuring the first and second portions from the first configuration to the second configuration. 13. The method of claim 11 or 12, comprising: flowing a fluid through the openings of the first and third ports in the second configuration without flowing the fluid through the opening of the second port. 14. The method of any one of claims 11-13, comprising: connecting a first aseptic connector to an aseptic connector of the hub. 15. The method of claim 14, comprising: connecting a second aseptic connector to one of the first port, the second port, or the third port not connected to the first aseptic connector. 16. A method of connecting fluid paths in an aseptic manner using a hub having a first aseptic connector, a second aseptic connector, a third aseptic connector and a first portion movable relative to a second portion, comprising: connecting a first tube having an aseptic connector to the first aseptic connector of the hub, wherein the first aseptic connector has a conduit and a removable strip positioned over an opening of the conduit and wherein the aseptic connector of the first tube includes a removable strip, and removing the removable strips of first aseptic connector and the first tube to place the conduit of the first aseptic connector in fluid communication with a conduit of the first tube; connecting a second tube having an aseptic connector to the second aseptic connector of the hub, wherein the second aseptic connector has a conduit and a removable strip positioned over an opening of the conduit and wherein the aseptic connector of the second tube includes a removable strip, and removing the removable strips of second aseptic connector and the second tube to place the conduit of the second aseptic connector in fluid communication with a conduit of the second tube; configuring the hub from a first configuration wherein the conduit of the first aseptic connector is in fluid communication with the conduit of the second aseptic connector to a second configuration wherein the conduit of the first aseptic connector is in fluid communication with a conduit of the third aseptic connector; and connecting a third tube having an aseptic connector to the third aseptic connector of the hub, wherein the third aseptic connector has a conduit and a removable strip positioned over an opening of the conduit and wherein the aseptic connector of the third tube includes a removable strip, and removing the removable strips of third aseptic connector and the third tube to place the conduit of the third aseptic connector in fluid communication with a conduit of the third tube. 17. The method of claim 16, comprising: passing a fluid through the conduit of the first tube, through the conduit of the first aseptic connector, the conduit of the second aseptic connector, and the conduit of the second tube when the hub is in the first configuration. 18. The method of claim 16 or 17, wherein: removing the removable strips of third aseptic connector and the third tube occurs after configuring the hub from the first configuration to the second configuration. 19. The method of claim 16, 17, or 18, comprising: passing a fluid through the conduit of the first tube, through the conduit of the first aseptic connector, the conduit of the third aseptic connector, and the conduit of the third tube when the hub is in the second configuration.
